heading: Today
text: Becoming sunny, blustery, and colder. Temperatures in the 20s to low 30s north, in the 30s south, steady or falling. Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clearing and cold. Lows 5 to 15 north, near zero in the cold spots, and in the teens to near 20 south. Winds north near 10 mph, becoming light in wind-sheltered valleys.

heading: Saturday
text: Periods of morning sunshine, mixing with more clouds through the afternoon. A passing snow shower in the Adirondacks. Highs from the low 20s to low 30s north to south. Light winds, becoming northwest 5 to 15 mph.
